message:
fix: update test for null history serialization and refresh TUI snapshots

Update the git_history test to expect commits/cycle_time as null (not
absent) matching the parity fix. Refresh 13 TUI snapshots for
concurrent agent's graph/main rendering improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ bvr | mode=Main | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=default | ? help |
 │   B ●open P2 B Bug fix                     ││ Status: open | Priority: p1 | Type: feature | State: ready             │
 │   T ●open P3 C UI polish                   ││ Assignee: unassigned | Repo: local | Estimate: n/a                     │
 │                                            ││ Created: n/a | Updated: n/a | Due: n/a  (t time-travel)                │
